reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus reports green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat directional conviction as unvalidated regardless of how high conv% is — only pairs with green_matches>=3 and hist_hr>60% have earned execution weight.
reflection.mechanism: green_matches counts how many times the current live indicator configuration has resolved profitably in historical memory. Zero matches means the present bull/bear tally is a novel configuration with no realized-edge basis; a high conv% only measures agreement among indicators, not that agreement's historical payoff. AUDUSD (12/30 bull, conv=75%, green_matches=3, hist_hr=68%) is the only pair whose signal has institutional-flow precedent; AUDNZD's 100% conv with green_matches=0 is unanchored consensus that historically has not paid.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus.green_matches < 3 or consensus.hist_hr < 0.60: veto_entry(pair)  # conv% alone is insufficient

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
